channel.title: Google on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Services Consultancy Testing Research Training
channel.description: Recent content in Google on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Services Consultancy Testing Research Training

item.title: setresuid(⚡): Glitching Google's TV Streamer from adb to root
item.description: We attack Google’s TV Streamer 4K with an ElectroMagnetic Fault Injection (EMFI) glitch on the Mediatek MT8696’s CPU. From an unprivileged adb shell, a single EM glitch during setresuid syscall makes the Linux kernel commit credentials with uid = 0. This is our hardwear.io NL 2025 talk in long form.
